message:
fix(state/backups): anchor cleanup_old_backups prefix to avoid cross-family sweep

cleanup_old_backups() filtered candidate backup entries with
`name.starts_with(prefix)`. That was too loose: for `prefix =
"settings.json"`, a sibling file like `settings.json.old` or a
sibling family `settings.jsona_*.bak` would be swept into the same
retention set, so the `keep=N` window could delete unrelated
backups.

Tighten the filter to require the exact separator-terminated anchor
produced by create_backup — `"{prefix}_"` — and also require the
`.bak` extension. Only files matching both conditions participate in
the retention window, preventing collateral deletion.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
